mappings.Transformations: parameter "anSupplierID" from iflow will get mapped.
parameter "anSupplierID" from iflow will get mapped.
parameter "anProviderANID" from iflow will get mapped.
if $anEnvName = PROD, then map "production" to deploymentmode else map "test"

if E1EDK03[IDDAT = 012]/UZEIT is > 0 select value of it into requestDate otherwise inform 000000.
if E1EDK03[IDDAT = 012]/DATUM is > 0 select value of datum into p_date. Use E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/USER_TIMEZONE to calculate date & time

if E1EDK03[IDDAT = 019]/UZEIT is > 0 select value of it into requestDate otherwise inform 000000.
if E1EDK03[IDDAT = 019]/DATUM is > 0 select value of datum into p_date. Use E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/USER_TIMEZONE to calculate date & time

if E1EDK03[IDDAT = 004]/UZEIT is > 0 select value of it into requestDate otherwise inform 000000.
if E1EDK03[IDDAT = 004]/DATUM is > 0 select value of datum into p_date. Use E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/USER_TIMEZONE to calculate date & time

mappings.Source: E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMPANY_LANG_ISO or E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMPANY_LANG or default language
mappings.Transformations: inform E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMPANY_LANG_ISO if not blank. Else inform E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMPANY_LANG else inform default language

get the description for matching type by calling "LookupTemplate" by passing 
            <xsl:with-param name="p_anERPSystemID" select="$anERPSystemID"/>
            <xsl:with-param name="p_anSupplierANID" select="$anSupplierANID"/>
            <xsl:with-param name="p_producttype" select="'AribaNetwork'"/>
            <xsl:with-param name="p_doctype" select="$anTargetDocumentType"/>
            <xsl:with-param name="p_lookupname" select="'QuoteRequestMatchingType'"/>
            <xsl:with-param name="p_input" select="E1EDK01/BSART"/>
check if description is blank then pass 
             <xsl:with-param name="p_anERPSystemID" select="$anERPSystemID"/>
             <xsl:with-param name="p_anSupplierANID" select="$anSupplierANID"/>
             <xsl:with-param name="p_producttype" select="'AribaSourcing'"/>
             <xsl:with-param name="p_doctype" select="$anTargetDocumentType"/>
             <xsl:with-param name="p_lookupname" select="'QuoteRequestMatchingType'"/>
             <xsl:with-param name="p_input" select="E1EDK01/BSART"/>
if E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/VENDOR_LANG is not blank, inform E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/VENDOR_)LANG_ISO else default language
if attribute name = "name" and E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/EMAIL is not blank, then map to "routing" else blank.
if E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/FAX is blank, then map to "routing" else blank.
if E1EDKA1/ISOAL not blank mapped to E1EDKA1/ISOAL otherwise mapped to E1EDKA1/LAND1
if E1EDKA1/LAND1 is not blank map to it. Elseif E1EDKA1/ISOAL not blank mapped to E1EDKA1/ISOAL. Otherwise map to space
if E1EDKA1/LAND1 is not blank map to it. Elseif E1EDKA1/ISOAL not blank mapped to E1EDKA1/ISOAL. Otherwise map to space
if E1EDKA1/LAND1 is not blank map to it. Elseif E1EDKA1/ISOAL not blank mapped to E1EDKA1/ISOAL. Otherwise map to space
if E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/CREATOR_LANG is not blank, map to E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/CREATOR_LANG_ISO otherwise $v_defaultLang
proceed if E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/CREATOR_FAX is not blank
mapped to E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/CREATOR_COUNTRY if attribute name = isoCountryCode

Call template "CommentsFillIdocOutPO" to fill comments by passing E1EDKT1, $anTargetDocumentType and $v_pd.
Call template "addContenIdIDOC" to add attachment by passing $v_attach as parameter
if E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMAPNY_LANG is not blank, map to E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMPANY_LANG_ISO otherwise $v_defaultLang
if E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMAPNY_LANG is not blank, map to E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMPANY_LANG_ISO otherwise $v_defaultLang
if E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMAPNY_LANG is not blank, map to E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMPANY_LANG_ISO otherwise $v_defaultLang
if E1EDK01/ZTERM is not blank, and attribute name='PaymentTermCode' then map to E1EDK01/ZTERM
if E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMAPNY_LANG is not blank, map to E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMPANY_LANG_ISO otherwise $v_defaultLang

mapped to constant "InternalNote" and for each E1EDKT1/E1EDKT2/E1ARBCIG_HDR_INTERNALNOTE, select value of COMMENTS by replacing ';' with '
'
mapped to constant "PRDocumentType" and for each E1EDP01/E1ARBCIG_RFQITEM, check position() = 1. if true select value of REQUISITION_DOCTYPE

mapped to constant "ExternalNote" and for each E1EDKT1/E1EDKT2/E1ARBCIG_HDR_EXTERNALNOTE, select value of COMMENTS by replacing ';' with '
'
mapped to name as "TargetValue" and get value of E1EDS01/SUMME

if E1EDK03[IDDAT = 020]/DATUM is not blank, map to name = ValididyEndDate. Get time into v_uzeit_vetdate if E1EDK03[IDDAT = 020]/UZEIT not blank, otherwise get time as '000000'. Call template 'ANDateTime" to get date by passing parameters E1EDK03[IDDAT = 020]/DATUM, $v_uzeit_vetdate and E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/USER_TIMEZONE.

if E1EDK03[IDDAT = 019]/DATUM is not blank, map to name = ValididyStartDate. Get time into v_uzeit_vstdate if E1EDK03[IDDAT = 019]/UZEIT not blank, otherwise get time as '000000'. Call template 'ANDateTime" to get date by passing parameters E1EDK03[IDDAT = 019]/DATUM, $v_uzeit_vstdate and E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/USER_TIMEZONE.

Get time into v_req_delivdate if E1EDP20/EZEIT not blank, otherwise get time as '000000'. Call template 'ANDateTime" to get requestedDeliveryDate by passing parameters E1EDP20/EDATU, $v_req_delivdate and E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/USER_TIMEZONE.
if E1EDP01/PSTYP = 0 then map to 'material'. If E1EDP01/PSTYP = 9, then map to 'service'
if E1EDP01/PSTYP = 0 then map to 'item'. If E1EDP01/PSTYP = 9, then map to 'composite'
if E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMAPNY_LANG is not blank, map to E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMPANY_LANG_ISO otherwise $v_defaultLang
mapped to constant "TrackingNumber" and get value of E1ARBCIG_RFQITEM/TRACKING_NUMBER

mapped to constant "ExternalNote" and for each E1EDPT1/E1EDPT2/E1ARBCIG_ITM_EXTERNALNOTE, select value of COMMENTS by replacing ';' with '
'

mapped to constant "InternalNote" and for each E1EDPT1/E1EDPT2/E1ARBCIG_ITM_INTERNALNOTE, select value of COMMENTS by replacing ';' with '
'
if E1EDPA1/ISOAL is not blank, then map to E1EDPA1/ISOAL otherwise E1EDPA1/LAND1
if $v_getRegionDesc = 'YES' then map to E1ARBCIG_RFQITEM/REGION_DESCRIPTION otherwise map to E1EDP01/REGIO
if E1EDPA1/ISOAL is not blank, then map to E1EDPA1/ISOAL otherwise E1EDPA1/LAND1
if E1EDPA1/LAND1 is not blank then map to it. If E1EDPA1/ISOAL is not blank then map it
if E1EDPA1/LAND1 is not blank then map to it. If E1EDPA1/ISOAL is not blank then map it

Call template "CommentsFillIdocOutPO" to fill comments by passing E1EDPT1, POSEX, $anTargetDocumentType and $v_pd.
Call template "addContenIdIDOC" to add attachment by passing $v_attach and POSEX as parameters
for each /ARBCIG_REQOTE/IDOC/E1EDP01/E1EDC01, check POSEX NE '0000000000' to proceed
if E1EDP01/E1EDC01/MENGE > 0 then map to it otherwise map to 0.000
if $v_srvmapkey first character = '5', then concatenate with first character with 1 otherwise populate $v_srvmapkey.

if ($v_removeLeadingZero) > 5 ( if(RANG > 0 ( if substring($v_removeLeadingZero, 1, 1) = '1') then replace 1 with 5) in other case then map to E1ARBCIG_SERVICE_INFO/PARENT_LINE). 
Otherwise select="substring(E1ARBCIG_SERVICE_INFO/PARENT_LINE, 6) into v_numcheck. 
If v_numCheck = 0, then map to E1ARBCIG_SERVICE_INFO/PARENT_LINE
if SGTYP = 001 then map to 'composite' otherwise to 'item'

proceed if "../POSEX != $v_zero_service_ln".if "$v_servicelinetype = 'STNDLN'" then map to 'standard', if "$v_servicelinetype = 'BLKTLN'" then 'blanket', if "$v_servicelinetype = 'CNTGLN'" then 'contingency', "$v_servicelinetype = 'OPNQLN'" then 'openquantity', "$v_servicelinetype = 'INFRLN'" then 'information' otherwise map to 'standard'.
proceed if E1EDC19[QUALF = '031'] or E1EDC19[QUALF = '032'] or > 0 and POSEX NE $v_zero_service_In
if E1EDC19[QUALF = 032]/IDTNR_LONG) > 0 then map to it. Otherwise map to E1EDC19[QUALF = 032]/IDTNR
if E1EDC19[QUALF = 031] and E1EDC19[QUALF = 031]/IDTNR_LONG) > 0 then map to it. Otherwise map to E1EDC19[QUALF = 031]/IDTNR
if POSEX != $v_zero_service_ln and E1EDC01/CURCY . 0 then map to E1EDC01/CURCY otherwise E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/CURRENCY
if POSEX != $v_zero_service_ln and SGTYP = '001' then proceed
if E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMAPNY_LANG is not blank, map to E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMPANY_LANG_ISO otherwise $v_defaultLang
if POSEX != $v_zero_service_ln and KTXT1 > 0 then map to E1EDC01/KTXT1
if E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMAPNY_LANG is not blank, map to E1EDK01/E1ARBCIG_HEADER/COMPANY_LANG_ISO otherwise $v_defaultLang
if "../POSEX != $v_zero_service_ln" and E1EDC01/MENEE > 0 map to E1EDC01/MENEE otherwise map to 'EA'
if "../POSEX != $v_zero_service_ln" and E1ARBCIG_SERVICE_INFO/WGBEZ > 0 then map to E1ARBCIG_SERVICE_INFO/WGBEZ. Otherwise map to constant 'Services'.
if "../POSEX != $v_zero_service_ln" and MATKL > 0 then map to it otherwise map to '000'.

Proceed for each E1EDCT1. if E1EDCT2/TDLINE = 'INTERNAL' map to $v_InternalServiceLineNote. if E1EDCT2/TDLINE = 'EXTERNAL' map to $v_ExternalServiceLineNote. Otherwise E1EDCT2/TDLINE. For each E1EDCT2/E1ARBCIG_SERVICE_TXT, select value of COMMENTS.
Add 'new line feed' at end of every comments i.e. E1EDKT2/TDLINE.

if E1ARBCIG_SERVICE_INFO/ALTERNATIVES = 'BASIC' map to 'basicLine. If E1ARBCIG_SERVICE_INFO/ALTERNATIVES,  startswith 'ALTER' then map to 'alternativeLine'.  If E1ARBCIG_SERVICE_INFO/ALTERNATIVES = 'STNRD' then map to 'noAlternative'.
If E1ARBCIG_SERVICE_INFO/ALTERNATIVES,  startswith 'ALTER' then map to E1ARBCIG_SERVICE_INFO/BASIC_LINE

if $v_attach/LINENUMBER = POSEX or (E1EDPT1) then call template "CommentsFillIdocOutPO" to fill comments by passing E1EDPT1, POSEX, $anTargetDocumentType and $v_pd.
Call template "addContenIdIDOC" to add attachment by passing $v_attach and POSEX as parameters
